content.en:
"So many Black Cloud Beasts!!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

It can be said that the strength of a Holy Son who has engraved seventy-two extreme extreme paths here, if he does not use holy arts, it will take a long time to kill a Black Cloud Beast, so many Black Cloud Beasts, it is really difficult for a Holy Son of the Fivefold Holy Gate to kill them.

But Ye Tian is different, he has comprehended more than a hundred kinds of extreme extreme paths, and the engraved extreme extreme paths have also surpassed one hundred and eight kinds, how terrifying his strength is!

His primordial control technique could kill a Black Cloud Beast in an instant, so as long as the Glass Sacred Cover was not broken, he could kill all of these Black Cloud Beasts.

Just as this group of Black Cloud Beasts attacked, Ye Tian immediately used another Primordial Control Technique, the Ten Directions Sword Realm, directly enveloping this area and trapping one Black Cloud Beast after another.

Puff puff puff!!!

The dense sword light pierced through these black cloud beasts, but a single sword light only hit them hard, but did not kill them.

However, they couldn't escape, so the sword light quickly wore out their surroundings, killing them one by one.

Soon after the death of these Black Cloud Beasts, their physical bodies were slowly absorbed by the core area of the Cloudless Rim, as if they had turned into the origin here, and they would slowly give birth to the traveling Black Cloud Beasts in the future.

In this way, it can be guaranteed that the Black Cloud Beast here will never be killed.

"What a magical place!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

However, he didn't delve into the reason, he just wanted to get enough resources from here.

"Jiuli Black Yuan Flower!"

"Lishui Golden Grass!"

"Dark Night Source Stone!"

"Xuangu Flower!"

"Nine-leaf centrifugal vine!"

The incomparably precious treasure resources were found by Ye Tian and then taken away one by one.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian was besieged by the Black Cloud Beasts from time to time, but his strength was too strong, and these Black Cloud Beasts could not threaten him at all.

But after a long time, his glazed holy shield was about to be unable to hold on, after all, it was always open to resist the suppression of the core area of the Cloudless Boundary, and the power of the holy art was naturally consumed very quickly.

"You have to go, otherwise it's dangerous, it's not important for the copy body to fall, but the resources that you finally collected are lost, it's a pity!"

Immediately, Ye Tian fled directly, and a large number of black cloud beasts chased and killed Ye Tian, as if they didn't want Ye Tian to leave.

However, Ye Tian still fought his way out of the encirclement and came out of the cloudless world.

When Ye Tian came out, he happened to be sensed by a triple ancestor.

"There are three ancestors coming out of the core area????

The Triple Ancestor was shocked.

But soon, he guessed a possibility: "It may be that he just entered not long ago, and when he saw danger, he immediately escaped, and he survived!"

Of course, even so, it takes a very terrifying strength to do it, otherwise the Triple Origin Ancestor will have to die if he enters, and he won't be able to survive for a breath.

......

There is no empty heavenly gate.

Ye Tian's replica body came back, with a smile on his face.

"This harvest is very big, although a lot of resources are used for the cultivation of the Quadruple Ancestors, and it is of little significance to improve the will of the Extreme Dao, but I can exchange it for the treasure resources that enhance the will of the Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he traded these resources through the Voidless Heavenly Gate.

I have to say that the resources suitable for the Quadruple Ancestor were very precious, so they were quickly sold out, and he also had countless resources on him that could enhance the will of the Extreme Dao.

"Next, you can work hard to improve the will of the Extreme Dao, comprehend more Extreme Extreme Dao, and when the resources are exhausted, you can go to the Cloudless Frontier to collect resources!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to swallow a large amount of resources to improve his Extreme Dao Will, and the Extreme Dao Will was increasing at an incredible speed, and the number of layers of his Will Pagoda was also increasing.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's Will Pagoda to exceed two hundred floors.

Two hundred and ten floors!

Two hundred and twenty floors!

Two hundred and thirty floors!

......

"Two hundred and thirty-six floors, the resources are exhausted!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the treasures used to comprehend the extreme path have not been exhausted, and he is ready to go to the cloudless end after those treasures are also exhausted.

Another time passed.

"The real resources have been exhausted, but my Extreme Extreme Dao has also comprehended one hundred and twenty-eight kinds, and one hundred and twenty-eight black characters have also been engraved on the Pagoda of Will. "

Ye Tian was quite satisfied with this progress, and his current strength was much stronger than before.

this day.

Ye Tian once again came to the core area of the Cloudless Rim.

There was no difference from when he came, but Ye Tian went a little deeper, after all, the places on the edge of the core area were all patronized by him, so the resources here were all taken away, so naturally he could only look for resources in the more core area.

This time, Ye Tian collected a lot of resources again, but he didn't go to the most core area.

He felt that there was a great terror there, so it was best not to go there for a short time, otherwise if he fell, he would come here in vain, and when his strength improved to a certain level, he would come here again.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian entered the cloudless realm again and again, and the resources he collected were all used to improve himself.

As a result, his Will Pagoda gradually rose to more than three hundred floors, and he mastered more and more extreme extreme paths.

And his constant trading of a large number of precious resources naturally attracted the attention of the high-level leaders of the Voidless Heavenly Gate.

Of course, the high-level leaders of the Voidless Heavenly Gate only thought that Ye Tian had found an incomparably precious treasure land, and Ye Tian would inevitably become the Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate in the future, so they did not investigate Ye Tian, let alone ask for Ye Tian's chance.

Otherwise, if this matter is known to the Void Fang Holy Gate, a group of high-ranking people will be finished.

After all, the Void Tooth Holy Gate had already set Ye Tian, and as soon as the time came, let Ye Tian enter the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

Moreover, the few masters of the Void Heaven Gate would never allow this kind of thing to happen.

So, some of the Quadruple Ancestors thought about it carefully, or when nothing happened.

......

"It's too difficult to raise the Pagoda of Will to the three hundred and sixty-fifth floor, how many resources have I spent, enough to bankrupt many Quadruple Ancestors, and I can't scrape together so many resources!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He even suspected that the Upper Spirit Origin Domain did not have the original ancestor with three hundred and sixty-five layers of Will Pagoda at all, of course, they couldn't condense it, after all, without first inscribed one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths, the Will Pagoda would not be able to break the boundary and continue to condense.

"The three hundred and twenty-fifth layer of the Will Pagoda has been exhausted, and the resources have been exhausted again, it seems that we must enter the depths of the core area of the Cloudless Edge!"

Ye Tian muttered.
